name: table-cells-empty
description: An empty table cell — horizontal layout with no content children. Used as a placeholder or spacer cell in data tables. Comes in two row-height variants (height=1 single-line, height=2 double-line) and three width variants (48px fixed, switch-width, or default/fluid).

anatomy.notes: The entire cell is a single empty container. No child layers exist in any variant — this cell intentionally holds no content.

fill.note: Bound to cross-file published library variable VariableID:4b97a7048a6aedae6ae1bbf0076a8ce0683702d1/515:722 from [NEW] UI Kit Klepierre; resolves to #FFFFFF (bg/default) in all brands.

itemSpacing.note: Bound to cross-file library variable VariableID:9fcc8e86ee40c9052121fe7b46e3c394744eb83d/1328:1; resolves to 8px = Sizing/XS.

literals.minHeightNote: TOKEN GAP — bound to external primitive spacing VariableID:1628ef2701274f14d27cbdbfc02f93663d1cc555/1050:1644 (36px). No --klp-size-* alias exists for 36px. Use min-h-[36px] literal.

a11y.notes: Renders as a <td> (or <div role='cell'>) with no interactive content. No keyboard interaction required for an empty cell.

tokenGaps.note: VariableID:1628ef2701274f14d27cbdbfc02f93663d1cc555/1050:1644 resolves to 36px. No --klp-size-* alias exists for 36px. Adapter should use min-h-[36px] literal. Fix: add Sizing/9 = 36px alias to 02 - Alias Spacing and expose as --klp-size-2xl or a dedicated --klp-size-row-sm token.
paddingLeft=12px and paddingRight=12px are literal (not bound to a variable). Value matches Sizing/S=12px → --klp-size-s. Fix: bind in Figma to Sizing/S variable.
paddingTop=8px and paddingBottom=8px are literal in height=1 variants. Value matches Sizing/XS=8px → --klp-size-xs. Fix: bind in Figma to Sizing/XS variable.
paddingTop=12px and paddingBottom=12px are literal in height=2 variant. Value matches Sizing/S=12px → --klp-size-s. Fix: bind in Figma to Sizing/S variable.
